title: More on consecutive multiplicatively dependent triples of integers
summary: In this paper, we extend recent work of the third author and Ziegler on triples of integers $(a,b,c)$, with the property that each of $(a,b,c)$, $(a+1,b+1,c+1)$ and $(a+2,b+2,c+2)$ is multiplicatively dependent, completely classifying such triples in case $a=2$. Our techniques include a variety of elementary arguments together with more involved machinery from Diophantine approximation.
